title: INtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Alexa+ and Kindle Scribe Now Work Together With ‘Send to Alexa’
items.description: The new “Send to Alexa” feature lets you send Kindle Scribe notebooks to your Echo device with just a couple of taps.

items.title: KYY X90G Quad Portable Monitor Extender Review: 3 More Screens
items.description: This accessory gives your laptop three extra displays—as long as you’re prepared to lug them around.

items.title: I Tried RentAHuman, Where AI Agents Hired Me to Hype Their AI Startups
items.description: Rather than offering a revolutionary new approach to gig work, RentAHuman is filled with bots that just want me to be another cog in the AI hype machi...

items.title: Many Adjustable Bed Frames Have a “Zero Gravity” Feature. I Tried It for a Week
items.description: I decided to try my adjustable bed frame’s “zero gravity” feature for a week. I wouldn’t do it again.

items.title: The Best Hearing Aids of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
items.description: These WIRED-tested devices will help you hear sounds more clearly. Never miss out on a dinner conversation again.

items.title: AI inference startup Modal Labs in talks to raise at $2.5B valuation, sources say
items.description: General Catalyst is in talks to lead the round for the four-year-old startup, according to our sources.

items.title: Apple’s Siri revamp reportedly delayed… again
items.description: While the new Siri was expected to launch with the upcoming iOS 26.4 update in March, now, the changes are expected to roll out more slowly over time,...

items.title: OpenAI disbands mission alignment team
items.description: The team's leader has been given a new role as OpenAI's chief futurist, while the other team members have been reassigned throughout the company.

items.title: Uber Eats launches AI assistant to help with grocery cart creation
items.description: Uber Eats launched a new AI feature, “Cart Assistant,” that can automatically add items to your cart based on text or image prompts.

items.title: xAI lays out interplanetary ambitions in public all-hands
items.description: On Wednesday, xAI took the rare step of publishing its full 45-minute all-hands presentation to the X platform, making it widely available.
